name: CRMOne
description:
What CRMOne Does

CRMOne is an all-in-one CRM and automation platform designed for marketing agencies and small businesses that want to simplify lead management, sales tracking, and customer engagement. It offers powerful tools to organize your pipeline, automate communication, and manage clients efficiently, all in a single, easy-to-use interface. With white-label options and team collaboration features, CRMOne helps agencies deliver consistent client experiences under their own brand.

Source: CRMOne

‍

Key Features

  • Centralized CRM for lead tracking, deal management, and contact organization.
  • Visual sales pipeline to monitor lead progress and close deals faster.
  • Built-in email and SMS automation for lead nurturing.
  • Custom workflows for automating repetitive tasks and follow-ups.
  • Appointment scheduling and calendar integrations.
  • Client dashboard with branded access and live data insights.
  • Team collaboration tools for assigning leads and tracking performance.
  • Integrations with popular tools like Google Workspace, Zapier, and Facebook Ads.
  • White-label capabilities for agencies to customize branding and domains.
  • Reporting and analytics for sales performance, conversions, and revenue trends.
  • Secure cloud-based storage for contact and deal information.

Benefits of CRMOne

  • Automate lead follow-ups and improve response times.
  • Increase transparency and collaboration across your sales and marketing teams.
  • Offer clients a professional, branded CRM experience.
  • Save time with ready-to-use automation workflows and templates.
  • Get real-time insights into performance metrics and deal pipelines.
  • Simplify scaling for agencies with white-labeled portals and flexible plans.

Pricing

Starts at $22 per user per month

Pros

✅ Clean, intuitive interface with minimal setup time

✅ Ideal for small agencies and growing businesses

✅ Affordable pricing compared to other all-in-one CRMs

Cons

❌ Limited third-party app integrations compared to enterprise CRMs

❌ Reporting customization could be improved
